app.welcomeBody: Select a conversation from the sidebar or create a new one to get started.

error.boundaryBody: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

login.subtitle: Sign in to your account
login.validationError: Please enter both email and password
login.footerNote: Authentication runs on Amazon Cognito. Sign in with a Cognito user directory or federate to your corporate identity provider (SAML/OIDC) — both are supported in production.

register.title: Create Your Account
register.errorTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
register.step1Body: After registration, you'll receive a verification email. Click the link to confirm your email address.
register.step2Body: An administrator will review and approve your account in Cognito. This typically takes 1–2 business days.
register.step3Body: Once approved, you'll receive a notification and can sign in with your credentials.
register.noteBody: AgentEchelon authenticates with Amazon Cognito. You can use a Cognito user directory directly, or federate to any standards-based identity provider (SAML, OIDC) for single sign-on with your corporate authentication system — both are production-ready options.
register.learnMoreLink: Learn more about enterprise identity integration →

verify.title: Verify Your Email
verify.sentTo: We've sent a verification code to
verify.resent: A new code is on its way. Check your inbox.
verify.resendError: Could not resend the code. Please try again.
verify.helpText: Didn't receive the code? Check your spam folder.

mfa.subtitle: Enter your authentication code to finish signing in
mfa.totpPrompt: Open your authenticator app and enter the current 6-digit code.
mfa.smsPrompt: Enter the code we texted to your phone.
mfa.error: Could not verify the code. Please try again.

forgot.title: Reset your password
forgot.subtitleRequest: Enter your email and we'll send a reset code
forgot.subtitleConfirm: Enter the code we emailed and choose a new password
forgot.requestError: Could not start the reset. Please try again.
forgot.codeSentTo: We sent a reset code to
forgot.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
forgot.confirmError: Could not reset the password. Please try again.

conversation.archiveConfirm: Archive this conversation? It becomes read-only for everyone and leaves the active list (you can still find it under "Show archived"). Members keep read-only access until it is permanently deleted 90 days after its last activity; administrators keep an archived copy. This cannot be undone.
conversation.readOnlyNotice: This conversation is archived and read-only.
conversation.emptyMessages: No messages yet. Start the conversation below.
conversation.battleWaitingOne: An assistant is waiting for your reply
conversation.battleWaitingMany: {{count}} assistants are waiting — choose who to reply to

mentionBanner.title: Multi-user conversation
mentionBanner.body: Mention <0>@assistant</0> or <1>@all</1> to engage me. Direct chat between members won't trigger a response.

membersPanel.title: Members
membersPanel.empty: No other members in this conversation.

remove.moderatorOnly: Only the channel creator can remove members.

newConversation.title: New Conversation
newConversation.subtitle: Choose a classification level and optionally name your conversation
newConversation.classificationHint: Determines agent capabilities and who can join
newConversation.titleFieldHint: Optional — leave blank to auto-name from your first message

open.label: Open
open.description: Public information only. Anyone can join.

basic.label: Basic
basic.description: Public context with basic Q&A capabilities.

standard.label: Standard
standard.description: Internal operations data. Conversation management tools.

premium.label: Premium
premium.description: Full access including financials, customers, and strategic data.

share.title: Share Conversation
share.emailHelper: The recipient must have an account. They will receive an email with a link to this conversation.
share.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
share.successMultiUser: {{name}} added. This is now a multi-user conversation — mention @assistant or @all to engage the bot.
share.emailWarningWithReason: Added to the channel, but the email invite could not be sent: {{reason}}
share.emailWarningNoReason: Added to the channel, but the email invite could not be sent.

banners.apiUnavailableBody: Check that VITE_ANALYTICS_API_URL is configured in your .env file and the Analytics stack is deployed.
banners.noDataBody: Data appears after messages flow through the archival pipeline (Kinesis → Firehose → S3). This typically takes 5 minutes after the first conversation.
banners.unsupportedTitle: This view isn't served by the current analytics mode.
